evidenceBoundary: Planning handoff only. Historical superseded credential-persistence evidence is not active proof. No active row is claimed to pass until current-document memory, erase-only cleanup, zero transfer, fail-closed transport, and G028 closure execute with current evidence.

tests.description: SCN-BUG001-001 current-document runtime has no serialized store or raw getter
SCN-BUG001-005 unknown and prototype-shaped providers preserve runtime and prototypes
SCN-BUG001-002 every lifecycle signal clears current-document memory
Canary BUG-001: real index loads shared status and erase controls with no credential editor
tests.testId: Canary BUG-001: real index loads shared status and erase controls with no credential editor
tests.requiredAssertion: The real index loads RLDATA before RLAPP and exposes non-secret status plus erase-only cleanup with zero current credential input.

tests.description: Regression BUG-001: one shared current-document capability owns every credential surface
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: one shared current-document capability owns every credential surface
tests.requiredAssertion: Registry-derived source and live-page inspection finds one shared owner, no tool-local credential API, and no current index credential input.

tests.description: Regression BUG-001: every lifecycle and document boundary starts unconfigured
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: every lifecycle and document boundary starts unconfigured
tests.requiredAssertion: Reload, route change, bfcache traversal, HTML-page navigation, close or reopen, tab, window, iframe, and browser-context boundaries all begin unconfigured and carry no bridge payload.

tests.description: Regression BUG-001: unknown and prototype-shaped providers fail without mutation
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: unknown and prototype-shaped providers fail without mutation
tests.requiredAssertion: Unknown, empty, inherited, constructor, and prototype-shaped IDs fail closed without changing runtime, policy, storage surfaces, or prototypes.

tests.description: SCN-BUG001-004 detection uses container metadata and performs zero legacy-value access transfer or activation
SCN-BUG001-006 clear all empties runtime before whole-container erase and never restores it
Regression BUG-001: legacy detection is metadata-only and cleanup is erase-only
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: legacy detection is metadata-only and cleanup is erase-only
tests.requiredAssertion: The UI exposes redacted metadata only, destructive disclosure precedes confirmation, dismissal is inert, whole registered containers are deleted without value access, and success requires every selected name absent.

tests.description: Regression BUG-001: clear all empties current memory before whole-container erase
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: clear all empties current memory before whole-container erase
tests.requiredAssertion: Clear all drops current memory first, removes whole registered containers without value readback, and reports explicit incomplete cleanup without restoring state.

tests.description: 250 metadata detect dismiss erase clear and partial-failure cycles read zero legacy values
SCN-BUG001-003 same-document authorization returns status and sanitized results only
SCN-BUG001-008 registered tools contain no credential DOM owner helper store broker or bridge
Regression BUG-001: same-document use blanks input and exposes status but never the credential
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: same-document use blanks input and exposes status but never the credential
tests.requiredAssertion: The controlled eligible document owns input and request, blanks the field immediately, exposes sanitized output only, and clears at the next lifecycle boundary.

tests.description: Regression BUG-001: index-to-tool navigation transfers no credential and every tool starts unconfigured
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: index-to-tool navigation transfers no credential and every tool starts unconfigured
tests.requiredAssertion: Index makes no continuity claim; every registered tool starts empty and receives zero credential data through URL, message, worker, cookie, opener, storage, history, DOM, or equivalent bridges.

tests.description: parallel registered pages tabs windows and contexts start empty with zero credential bridges
SCN-BUG001-010 exact-origin header request rejects credential query names and alternate transports
SCN-BUG001-009 Twelve Data and all incomplete production policies send zero credential requests
SCN-BUG001-010 auth failure performs one header attempt and no fallback
Regression BUG-001: sentinel credential never appears in DOM console errors URL or referrer
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: sentinel credential never appears in DOM console errors URL or referrer
tests.requiredAssertion: The sentinel is absent from DOM, accessibility output, events, console, errors, analytics, URLs, referrers, browser bridges, screenshots, traces, snapshots, and test artifacts.

tests.description: Regression BUG-001: Twelve Data browser credential calls remain disabled without authorization evidence
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: Twelve Data browser credential calls remain disabled without authorization evidence
tests.requiredAssertion: Twelve Data is rejected before credential collection and sends zero browser credential requests or alternate fallbacks.

tests.description: Regression BUG-001: approved header auth never places credentials in URLs or retries with query auth
tests.testId: Regression BUG-001: approved header auth never places credentials in URLs or retries with query auth
tests.requiredAssertion: A controlled eligible policy performs one exact-origin approved-header attempt with no credential URL, query, redirect, referrer, provider, origin, proxy, or transport fallback.
